main_prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a lone traveler standing still on a windy ocean cliff at sunset, seen from behind, facing the horizon, dramatic clouds, soft golden-hour light, melancholic atmosphere, long coat moving gently in the wind, large negative space, emotional scale, realistic cinematic composition, deep environment depth, natural color grading
negative_prompt: low detail, extra limbs, distorted anatomy, cluttered composition, chaotic background, oversaturated light, cartoon styling
continuity_note: Keep the traveler visually solitary and small within the frame while preserving the same wardrobe silhouette and sunset palette.
